div.div:
Machine-readable, spec-compliant.
Agents parse, validate, and act without human interpretation.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 248, 248), rgb(24, 24, 24)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(204, 204, 204), rgb(62, 62, 62));

div.div:
Stage 1
No template.
Requirements are
freeform notes, chat
messages, or verbal
briefings. Not stored
in retrievable form.
Non-transferable.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 223px; margin-left: 951px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stages 5–6
Intent Boundary
Documents
Requirements shift from
feature specification to:
• Outcome constraints
• Intent boundaries
• Delegation scope
• Escalation thresholds
The requirement is a
contract with the
agent system, not a
build instruction.
